triage_rows.why_now: identity and concept purity are the first hard blockers for broader symbol evidence reuse
future policy/news/fundamental streams cannot be trusted or replayed without object separation
noise resistance must arrive before broader attention and news ingestion scales up
the repo already has rich labels, but they remain branch-local rather than reusable information-center assets
execution-adjacent work should remain downstream of identity, event, and quality foundations

interpretation: V1.34JZ converts the master blueprint into an implementation order.
The most important restraint is sequencing: do not rush into shadow binding or execution-facing plumbing before identity, event objects, and quality controls are stable.
